title: codereview-pass-3: security/idiomatic review of RPL_DAO sync changes
description: No security issues (no new crypto, no secret exposure, input validation in matches() preserved). Style now consistent with Rust FieldDescriptor explicit targets. No dead code. Tests pass including cross-impl vector check. Ready to close uwuz and child review beads.
close_reason: Synced rules.py FieldDescriptors (explicit target_value=0 for reserved), codec/headers.py comments per adaptation.md and Rust RPL_DAO model (lines ~280 in rules.py, ~414 in codec.rs). 3 independent codereview passes filed as beads n6lb/jxdw/xqd5 (correctness, alignment, security/idiom). Python+ Rust tests/vectors pass. Mimics Rust style and triple-impl discipline.
